summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kevin AI Interviewer Platform's major upgrade to structured, customizable interview engine. All new features tested successfully including interview config system, resume structuring, question planning, state management, enhanced evaluation, and frontend progress tracking.
passed_tests: Authentication with test session token works correctly
Resume structuring engine parses resume into structured JSON (6 skills, 2 projects, 1 experience, 1 education)
Interview config system accepts type/level/role/duration parameters
Question planning system distributes questions across sections (7 total questions for 15min technical interview)
State management tracks current question, sections covered, and progress
Enhanced Kevin prompt includes config-aware structured resume and question plan
Structured evaluation returns improvements and section_scores
Interview Config page renders with all selectors (type, level, role, duration)
Interview page shows progress bars (question + time)
Interview page shows section coverage indicators
Interview page shows current section badge and countdown timer
Interview page shows question counter in Q1/7 format
Report detail page shows interview config info
Report detail page shows improvements section with actionable items
Report detail page shows section breakdown scores
Landing page loads correctly for unauthenticated users
